creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 199139
Update to PowerDNS Recursor 4.1.7

This release fixes the following security advisories:
- PowerDNS Security Advisory 2018-04 (CVE-2018-10851)
- PowerDNS Security Advisory 2018-06 (CVE-2018-14626)
- PowerDNS Security Advisory 2018-07 (CVE-2018-14644) (updated fix)

It also contains several improvements and bug fixes.

Full changelog: https://doc.powerdns.com/recursor/changelog/4.1.html#change-4.1.7

Buildlog: https://pkg.cainites.net/data/latest-per-pkg/powerdns-recursor/4.1.7/freebsd_11x64-system.log

Deleted files: files/patch-opensslsigners.cc
